ValidationRule.description: Required Employee Number and Id Erp Besides customer user and external user
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(AND(Profile.Name!='Customer Community User (Custom)', Profile.Name!='Chatter External User', Profile.Name!='Chatter Free User'), OR(ISBLANK( ID_ERP__c ), ISBLANK(EmployeeNumber)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Employee Number and ID ERP fields are required
